zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de Craon I於大約1078年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧時，他的父親Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon25歲，母親Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais20歲。他於1092年與Isabella FitzBaldric在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福萊斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1121年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福萊斯頓享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy de Craon I于大约1078年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧时，他的父亲Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon25岁，母亲Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais20岁。他于1092年与Isabella FitzBaldric在英国英格兰林可爾史爾福萊斯頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1121年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾福萊斯頓享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Craon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Krahn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerd, Gerhard, Hans, Hans-Peter, Horst, Irmgard, Mathias, Otto, Wilhelm, Willi.
German: nickname for a tall, slim long-legged person, from Middle Low German krane ‘crane’. Compare Kranich .

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de Craon I was born about 1078, in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon, was 25 and his mother, Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais, was 20. He married Isabella FitzBaldric in 1092, in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1121, in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de Craon I est né environ 1078, à Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabella FitzBaldric en 1092, à Freiston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1121, à Freiston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de Craon I um 1078 in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon 25 und seine Mutter Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais 20. Er hat 1092 in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Isabella FitzBaldric geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1121 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Craon I è nato il circa 1078 nel Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabella FitzBaldric nel 1092, nel Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1121, nel Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Craon Iが約1078年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンクラオンで生まれた時，父Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craonは25歳，母Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelaisは20歳であった。1092年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフレイストンでIsabella FitzBaldricと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1121年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフレイストンで45歳で死去した。

ko.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라
ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Craon I(이)가 대략 1078년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1092년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 프레이스턴에서 Isabella FitzBaldric(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1121년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 프레이스턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Craon I nasceu aproximadamente 1078, em Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella FitzBaldric em 1092, em Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: краон, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de Craon I родился около 1078 г. в местности краон, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella FitzBaldric в 1092 г. в местности фристон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1121 г. в местности фристон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
